generated_text_by_instance.text: In an NHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Carolina Hurricanes defeated the Columbus Blue Jackets 3-2. Both teams remained scoreless through the first two periods, with all scoring occurring in the third period.

In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Spartak Moscow defeated Avtomobilist Yekaterinburg 4-1. After a scoreless first period, Spartak took control with two goals in both the second and third periods, while Avtomobilist managed only a single goal in the final period.
In a Russian MHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 4-3. After a 3-3 tie in regulation time, Stalnye Lisy secured the victory via a penalty shootout.
Mora IK dominated Almtuna IS with a 6-0 victory in round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, scoring two goals in the second period and four in the third.
In the MHL 23/24 season, Stalnye Lisy defeated Irbis Kazan 5-3. Stalnye Lisy led early with 2 goals in the first period and maintained their advantage to secure the victory.
In round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season, Falu IF defeated Mariestads BOIS 5-4 after overtime, following a 4-4 deadlock in regulation time.

In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League in Austria, HC TWK Innsbruck defeated EC VSV 3-2. After trailing 0-1 in the first period, Innsbruck rallied with two goals in the second and one in the third to secure the win.

In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga 23/24 season, GKS Tychy defeated Unia Oświęcim 5-4. After a scoreless first period and a 2-2 tie in the second, GKS Tychy secured the win with three goals in the final period.
In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga (23/24 season), TAURON Podhale Nowy Targ secured a dominant 10-3 victory over JKH GKS Jastrzębie, fueled by a massive 7-0 surge in the second period.
In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Vityaz Podolsk defeated Barys Astana 5-2, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.
In an AHL 23/24 regular season game, the Bridgeport Islanders defeated the Belleville Senators 4-2, largely driven by a strong second-period performance where they outscored the Senators 3-1.
Traktor Chelyabinsk defeated Torpedo Nizhny Novgorod 2-1 in a KHL 23/24 regular season match.
In round 24 of the ICE Hockey League 23/24, the Graz 99ers defeated the Vienna Capitals 4-3 after overtime, following a 3-3 draw in regulation time.

In round 1 of the SDHL 23/24 season, Modo Hockey defeated Leksands IF 3-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-0 lead for Leksands in the second, Modo Hockey secured the victory with three goals in the final period.
In round 22 of the Polish Ekstraliga 23/24 season, Tauron KH GKS Katowice dominated Comarch Cracovia with a 7-2 victory, establishing a commanding lead with 5 goals in the first period.

In round 22 of the Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season, HC Olomouc defeated HC Kometa Brno 3-1. After a tied first period, Olomouc secured the win by scoring one goal in each of the subsequent periods.
In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Boston College Eagles defeated Harvard University 4-1, securing the win with a dominant three-goal performance in the third period.
In round 25 of the Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season), HC Frýdek-Místek secured a dominant 4-0 victory over HC Stadion Litoměřice, scoring consistently across all three periods.
The Abbotsford Canucks decisively defeated the Calgary Wranglers 7-2 in an AHL 23/24 regular season game, dominating the first two periods with 3 goals each.

In the opening round of the 23/24 Elite League, the Belfast Giants defeated the Nottingham Panthers 4-2. The game was tied 1-1 after the first period and remained scoreless in the second, but Belfast secured the victory with three goals in the final period.
In the Elite League 23/24 opening round, the Sheffield Steelers defeated the Guildford Flames 6-2, securing the win with a dominant four-goal performance in the third period.
In round 22 of the German DEL 23/24 ice hockey season, the Iserlohn Roosters defeated Eisbären Berlin 3-0, scoring twice in the first period and once in the third.

In an OHL 23/24 regular season match, the Peterborough Petes defeated the Sudbury Wolves 5-3. Peterborough maintained a lead throughout the game, scoring consistently across all three periods (2-1-2) compared to Sudbury's 1-0-2.
In round 20 of the SHL 23/24 season, Rögle BK defeated Malmö Redhawks 4-0, scoring two goals in the first period and one in each of the following two periods.
In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Providence Friars defeated the Arizona State Sun Devils 2-1. All scoring occurred in the second period.

In round 18 of the German Oberliga Nord 23/24 season, EHC Erfurt defeated Fuchse Duisburg 4-3. After trailing 1-0 in the first period and tying it 3-3 by the end of the second, Erfurt secured the win with two goals in the final period.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Halifax Mooseheads defeated the Moncton Wildcats 4-0, scoring consistently across all three periods.

In round 22 of the Czech Republic Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24, HC Motor České Budějovice defeated HC Verva Litvínov 1-0. The game remained scoreless through the first two periods, with the decisive goal scored in the third period.
In an NCAA Men's ice hockey regular season game (23/24), the Miami Ohio Redhawks defeated the Mercyhurst Lakers 2-0, scoring one goal each in the first and third periods.
In a QMJHL 23/24 regular season game, the Drummondville Voltigeurs defeated the Shawinigan Cataractes 3-1. All scoring occurred in the third period after a scoreless first and second.

In a Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, HK Ryazan defeated HC Chelny 3-1. The game remained scoreless in the first period, with Chelny scoring in the second, before Ryazan secured the victory with three goals in the final period.

In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season opener, Neman Grodno defeated Shakhter Soligorsk 3-2. After a 2-2 tie in the first period, Neman Grodno secured the win with a single goal in the second period, followed by a scoreless third.
In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Vitebsk secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Khimik-SKA Novopolotsk, with the majority of their scoring occurring in the second period.

In round 25 of the Czech Republic's 1st Liga (23/24 season), HC ZUBR Přerov defeated PSG Berani Zlín 3-2. The match was tied 2-2 after regulation time, with both teams scoring one goal each in the first two periods and neither scoring in the third; HC ZUBR Přerov ultimately secured the win via a penalty shootout.

In round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, BIK Karlskoga defeated Östersunds IK 2-1. After Östersund took an early lead in the first period, Karlskoga rallied with a goal in both the second and third periods to secure the victory.

The Sudbury Wolves defeated the Oshawa Generals 7-5 in an OHL 23/24 regular season game. Despite trailing 1-0 after the first period, Sudbury surged with 7 goals across the final two periods to secure the victory.
In a VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Molot Perm defeated SKA-Neva 2-0, scoring one goal in each of the second and third periods.
In the opening round of Sweden's HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season, Bodens HF defeated Hudiksvalls HC 4-1, securing the win with a strong three-goal performance in the first period.
In the opening round of the 23/24 Alps Hockey League, Rittner Buam defeated EHC Lustenau 7-3, maintaining a consistent scoring lead across all three periods.
In round 25 of the Czech Republic's Chance Liga (23/24 season), HC Dukla Jihlava defeated HC Banik Sokolov with a final score of 4-1.
In round 21 of the Germany DEL 2 23/24 season, EV Landshut defeated the Bietigheim Steelers 4-2.

In the WHL 23/24 Women Championship, Biryusa Krasnoyarsk defeated Tornado Dmitrov 3-1. Biryusa took an early lead with two goals in the first period and added a final goal in the third to secure the victory.
In an NHL 23/24 regular season game, the Detroit Red Wings defeated the Minnesota Wild 4-1, pulling away with three goals scored across the second and third periods after a 1-1 tie in the first.
Loko Yaroslavl defeated Mikhailov Academy 4-0 in a Russian MHL ice hockey match during the 23/24 season, with all scoring occurring in the first two periods.

In a KHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, Lokomotiv Yaroslavl defeated CSKA Moscow 3-2. Lokomotiv took an early lead in the first period and sealed the win with a goal in the third, while CSKA's scoring was concentrated entirely in the second period.

In round 25 of the Czech Republic's Chance Liga (23/24 season), LHK Jestřábi Prostějov defeated HC RT Torax Poruba 5-4. After trailing 1-0 in the first period, Prostějov dominated the second period 3-0 and held on through a high-scoring third period to secure the win.

In round 21 of the German ice hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, Heilbronner Falken defeated Lindau Islanders 4-1. Heilbronn secured the win with goals in the first and third periods, while Lindau only managed to score once in the opening period.

In round 21 of the Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Poprad decisively defeated HKM Zvolen with a final score of 5-1, driven by a strong second-period performance where they scored three goals.
In a Russian VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, HC AKM Tula secured a dominant 5-0 victory over Omskie Kryliya, scoring consistently across all three periods.
In the first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season, Hanvikens SK defeated Segeltorps IF 6-2, pulling away with a strong three-goal third period.
In Round 19 of the Swedish Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, AIK defeated Tingsryds AIF 3-2 after overtime (AET), following a 2-2 draw in regulation time.
In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League, HK Olimpija defeated KAC Klagenfurt 3-2, securing the win via a penalty shootout after the game ended 2-2 in normal time.
In round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus ice hockey season, Brûleurs de Loups Grenoble secured a dominant 5-0 victory over Anglet Hormadi Pays Basque, scoring consistently across all three periods.
In the Belarus Extraliga 23/24 season, HK Gomel defeated HK Lida 4-2. Gomel secured the win primarily in the first two periods, while Lida managed a goal in the first and third.
In the Suomi Sarja 23/24 season, LeKi Hockey defeated Riemu 5-1. LeKi dominated the third period with four goals to secure the victory.
In a Russian VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Neftyanik Almetyevsk defeated Gornyak UMMC 4-1, dominating the first two periods before each team scored once in the third.

In a round 20 Ligue Magnus match for the 23/24 season, Boxers de Bordeaux defeated Jokers de Cergy-Pontoise 4-3 after overtime. The game was tied 3-3 at the end of regulation, with Bordeaux dominating the first half and Cergy-Pontoise fighting back in the third period.
In the first round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, Corona Brașov defeated UTE with a final score of 6-2.

In the Germany Oberliga Nord 23/24 season (Round 18), Herner EV defeated the Rostock Piranhas 5-4. The match ended in a 4-4 draw after regulation time, with Herner EV securing the win via a penalty shootout.
In the opening round of the SDHL 23/24 season, SDE Hockey secured a dominant 6-1 victory over AIK IF, scoring consistently with two goals in each of the three periods.

In an NHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Nashville Predators defeated the Winnipeg Jets 3-2. Nashville secured their lead with three goals scored across the first two periods, while Winnipeg attempted a late comeback with two goals in the third period.
In the Russia WHL 23/24 season, Biryusa Krasnoyarsk dominated Tornado Dmitrov with an 8-2 victory, driven by a strong five-goal performance in the second period.

In an NHL 23/24 regular season game, the Columbus Blue Jackets defeated the Boston Bruins 5-2. Columbus took a commanding lead early, scoring five goals across three periods, while Boston was held scoreless until the third period.
In the first round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, FEHA19 defeated Dunaújvárosi Acélbikák 1-0, with the decisive goal scored in the second period.
In round 20 of the 23/24 Ligue Magnus, Amiens Hockey Élite secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Chamonix, with Amiens scoring three goals in both the first and third periods.
Brynäs IF defeated Nybro IF 4-1 in round 19 of the Hockey Allsvenskan 23/24 season, pulling away with three goals in the final two periods after a 1-1 tie in the first.
In the MHL 23/24 season, Amurskie Tigry defeated Sahalinskie Akuly 4-2. After a scoreless first period, Amurskie Tigry took control in the second and third periods to secure the victory.

In round 21 of the German DEL 2 23/24 season, VER Selb defeated Dresdner Eislöwen 5-3. Selb took an early lead in the first period, while Dresden rallied in the second, but Selb ultimately secured the victory.

In a WHL 23/24 regular season matchup, the Brandon Wheat Kings defeated the Prince Albert Raiders 3-1. After a scoreless first period, the Wheat Kings took control in the second with two goals, ultimately securing the win.
HIFK Helsinki dominated RoKi Hockey with a 6-0 shutout victory in the opening round of the 23/24 Naisten Liiga women's ice hockey season.
In round 18 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Nord 23/24 season, EC Hannover Indians secured a dominant 11-4 victory over the Herforder Ice Dragons.

In round 18 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga 23/24, ESC Halle Saale Bulls defeated Hammer Eisbären 6-3. Despite Hammer Eisbären leading 2-0 after the first period, the Saale Bulls dominated the second period with 5 goals to secure the victory.

In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, HC Khimik Voskresensk defeated Izhstal Izhevsk 2-1. After a scoreless first period, Khimik took the lead in the second, and both teams scored once in the third to finalize the result.

In round 24 of the 23/24 ICE Hockey League, HC Bolzano defeated Pioneers Vorarlberg 4-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-1 tie in the second, Bolzano dominated the third period with three goals to secure the victory.
In a KHL 23/24 round 1 match, Severstal Cherepovets defeated Sibir Novosibirsk 2-1.

In the MHL 23/24 season (Round 1), Almaz Cherepovets decisively defeated Kapitan Stupino 7-2. Almaz Cherepovets dominated the first two periods, scoring 5 goals, while Kapitan Stupino managed all their scoring in the third period.
In the first round of the HockeyEttan Ostra 23/24 season, Visby/Roma HK defeated Wings HC 3-2.
The Victoriaville Tigres defeated the Quebec Remparts 6-2 in a QMJHL 23/24 season game, with the Tigres dominating throughout, particularly in the second period.
In round 21 of the German Ice Hockey Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, Blue Devils Weiden defeated the Höchstadt Alligators 5-3.
In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Zauralie Kurgan defeated CSK VVS Samara 5-4 after a penalty shootout, following a 4-4 draw in regulation time.
In the opening round of the 23/24 Metal Ligaen (Superisligaen), Rødovre Mighty Bulls defeated Herning Blue Fox 3-2, securing the win via a penalty shootout after a 2-2 draw in regulation time.

In round 22 of the Czech Republic's Extraliga 23/24 ice hockey season, BK Mladá Boleslav defeated HC Rytíři Kladno 3-2. After finishing regulation time tied at 2-2, BK Mladá Boleslav secured the victory via a penalty shootout.
In an ECHL 23/24 regular season game, the Indy Fuel defeated the Kalamazoo Wings 4-2.
Deggendorfer SC defeated SC Riessersee 4-1 in round 21 of the German Oberliga Sud 23/24 season, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.
In an OHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, the Saginaw Spirit defeated the Niagara IceDogs 6-2, dominating early with three goals in the first period.
In the opening round of the HockeyEttan Norra 23/24 season, Piteå HC secured a dominant 6-1 victory over Strömsbro If, scoring two goals in each of the three periods.
The Edmonton Oilers dominated the Anaheim Ducks 8-2 in an NHL 23/24 round 1 matchup, securing the win primarily with a strong four-goal performance in the first period.

In a VHL 23/24 ice hockey match, Sokol Krasnoyarsk defeated Buran Voronezh 3-2. After a scoreless first two periods, both teams scored two goals in the third to end regulation in a 2-2 tie; Sokol Krasnoyarsk ultimately secured the victory via a penalty shootout.
In an AHL 23/24 matchup, the Henderson Silver Knights defeated the Tucson Roadrunners 3-2 after overtime, following a 2-2 tie in regulation.

In the U20 League Stage 2 Division 2 (Young Stars League 23/24), Deac Jegkorong Akademia U20 defeated Vasas Budapest Stars U20 with a final score of 4-1. After a scoreless first period and a 1-1 tie in the second, Deac Jegkorong Akademia secured the victory with three goals in the third period.
Lindlövens IF defeated Forshaga IF 4-2 in round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Vastra 23/24 season.
In round 1 of the 23/24 Elite League, the Cardiff Devils secured a dominant 6-0 victory over the Fife Flyers, with a strong 4-goal surge in the third period.
In round 14 of the HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season, Alvesta SK defeated Mörrum Gois IK 6-2, securing the win with a dominant four-goal performance in the third period.
In round 21 of the Slovakian Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HC Košice defeated HK Nitra 4-0, scoring two goals in both the first and third periods.
In the opening round of the Erste Liga 23/24 ice hockey season, FTC-Telekom defeated Gyergyói HK 4-1, with all scoring occurring in the second period.

In a Russian VHL 23/24 round 1 ice hockey match, Chelmet Chelyabinsk defeated Dizel Penza 4-1. Despite Dizel Penza leading 1-0 after the first period, Chelmet Chelyabinsk secured the win with a dominant four-goal surge in the third period.
In the MHL 23/24 season, Belye Medvedi defeated Chaika Nizhny Novgorod 4-1. Belye Medvedi dominated the match, particularly in the first period where they took a 2-0 lead.
In an AHL 23/24 season matchup, the Hershey Bears defeated the Iowa Wild 2-1. Hershey secured the win early with two goals in the first period, while Iowa managed a single response in the second.
In round 14 of the Swedish HockeyEttan Sodra 23/24 season, Vimmerby HC defeated Halmstad Hammers HC 4-3, securing the win via a penalty shootout after a 3-3 draw in normal time.
In round 21 of the Slovakia Ice Hockey Extraliga 23/24 season, HC Slovan Bratislava defeated HC Nové Zámky 5-2, maintaining a consistent lead across all three periods.
